body.body:
Audit found stale instance folders at ~/.TheIgors/ root:
- Igor-wild-0001/ (capitalized — old naming)
- igor_wild-0001/ (dash variant — old naming)
- igor_Igor_wild_0001/ (malformed)
Active instance: igor_wild_0001/ (underscore, lowercase)

TASK: For each stale folder:
1. Check last-modified date and contents
2. Verify nothing active points to it (grep source for the folder name)
3. Report findings — do NOT delete without confirming with Akien
4. If clearly safe (empty, or only stale logs): list as deletion candidate

SCOPE: read-only investigation + report. No deletions without explicit approval.
OUTPUT: candidate list with risk assessment per folder.
body.title: Investigate and clean stale instance folders at ~/.TheIgors/ root
body.result: Instance cleanup investigation complete. Found 4 stale folders at ~/.TheIgors/ root: (1) Igor-wild-0001 — contains old DB + runtime data, referenced by 8 active source files + CHROME_PROFILE_PATH env var — HIGH risk, requires path migration (D181 debt) before deletion. (2-4) Three malformed folders (igor_Igor_wild_0001, igor_igor_wild_0001, igor_wild-0001) — no code references, minimal content, safe to delete (74K total). Deletion candidates identified. Awaiting approval before removal.
